structured_content.response:
The process `J09A` has been executed end-to-end.

Key outcomes:
- Temporary table `J09A_temp` was created from `decision_table` for tours `TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'` and classified into `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (KSA/EVU) according to the specified rules.
- Data was joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- For each `EQUNR`, customer data was taken from `SALES_MASTER` when available; otherwise from `NET_MASTER`.
- A CSV export `J09A.csv` was generated with the required columns and order:
  - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
- File path of the CSV:  
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_city_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_42/J09A.csv`
- An email with this CSV attached was created and (per the environment) dispatched to: `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary tables (`J09A_temp`, `J09A_working`, `J09A_final`) were dropped.

If you want, I can also query and show you a sample of the exported data.

kwargs.content:
The process with `process_rule_id` **J09A** has been executed successfully end-to-end.

Summary of what was done:
- Created temporary table `J09A_temp` from `decision_table` for tours matching `TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'`.
- Classified records into `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (KSA/EVU) according to the process rules.
- Joined data with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- For each `EQUNR`, preferred customer data from `SALES_MASTER`, falling back to `NET_MASTER` when missing.
- Generated CSV export **`J09A.csv`** with columns (in this order):  
  `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
- Stored at:  
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_city_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_42/J09A.csv`
- Created and dispatched an email with this CSV attached to: `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped temporary tables: `J09A_temp`, `J09A_working`, `J09A_final`.

If you tell me what you want to do next (e.g., verify contents, rerun with changes, or run another process ID), I can proceed.
